Avoid generic SaaS, fintech, antifraud and enterprise architecture angles unless they are directly tied to affiliate operations.

article_structures_en: Hook -> what changed -> operator impact -> examples -> checklist
Problem -> stack -> exact steps -> failure cases -> verification
Case context -> setup -> metrics -> bottlenecks -> reusable template
Trend brief -> source signals -> implications -> action plan -> summary
How-to -> prerequisites -> implementation -> debugging -> final SOP
Editorial opener -> market context -> backstage realities -> operator takeaways -> conclusion
Myth vs reality -> evidence -> working model -> examples -> summary
Source review -> trust factors -> risk points -> adaptation plan -> final notes
Launch memo -> assets -> routing -> tracking -> QA -> wrap-up
Postmortem -> failure chain -> fixes -> safeguards -> reusable lessons
Checklist-first -> environment -> setup -> validation -> scaling notes -> conclusion
Case-by-case comparison -> bundle A vs bundle B -> constraints -> result -> takeaways
article_structures_ru: Хук -> что изменилось -> влияние на оператора -> примеры -> чеклист
Проблема -> стек -> точные шаги -> типовые фейлы -> проверка
Контекст кейса -> сетап -> метрики -> узкие места -> шаблон
Trend brief -> сигналы источника -> выводы -> план действий -> итог
How-to -> prerequisites -> внедрение -> отладка -> финальный SOP
Редакционное вступление -> контекст рынка -> закулисная реальность -> выводы для оператора -> итог
Миф и реальность -> факты -> рабочая модель -> примеры -> вывод
Обзор источника -> trust-факторы -> риск-точки -> план адаптации -> финальные заметки
Launch memo -> ассеты -> routing -> tracking -> QA -> итог
Постмортем -> цепочка сбоя -> фиксы -> safeguards -> уроки
Чеклист-сначала -> окружение -> настройка -> валидация -> scaling notes -> заключение
Сравнение кейсов -> связка A vs связка B -> ограничения -> результат -> выводы
article_user_prompt_append_en: Write for affiliate operators, media buyers, farmers and tracker owners. Prefer practical details, current platform behavior, tradeoffs, checklists and reusable workflows over generic theory. Keep topical gravity around CPA, sources, creatives, moderation, tracking, farm, offers and backstage operations.
article_user_prompt_append_ru: Пиши для операторов affiliate-команд, медиабаеров, фармеров и владельцев трекеров. Приоритет: практические детали, текущее поведение платформ, tradeoffs, чеклисты и переиспользуемые workflows, а не общая теория. Центр тяжести тем: CPA, источники, креативы, модерация, трекинг, фарм, офферы и backstage-операции.

image_compositions.instruction: Centered composition with weighted focal mass and subtle directional imbalance.
Slightly rotated central axis creating modern tension.
Strong perspective vanishing point pulling viewer inward.
Large foreground mass framing distant focal subject.
Tall vertical composition emphasizing hierarchy and authority.
Wide lateral flow guiding attention across the frame.
Low-angle composition enhancing authority and structural weight.
Elevated overview composition for analytical dominance.
Extended depth of field emphasizing layered complexity.
Clear diagonal division between conceptual zones.
Active borders guiding attention inward.
Dense grouping of elements forming weighted focus.
Layered planes intersecting for dynamic depth.
Visual movement connecting opposite corners.
Large atmospheric background with small focal subject.
Strong cross intersection dividing visual zones.
Multiple horizontal bands with narrative layering.
Perspective funnel guiding eye toward central vanishing point.
Corridor-like depth guiding attention forward.
Heavy central anchor grounded by layered depth.
Centered focal composition with clear subject priority.
Strong diagonal flow with dynamic motion and tension.
Fragmented mirrored composition, asymmetry with reflective motifs.
Golden ratio based layout for balanced visual hierarchy.
Rule-of-thirds placement with off-center focal points.
Asymmetrical but balanced layout with weighted visual masses.

preview_image_prompt_template: Create a high-quality {{image_style}} hero image for article "{{title}}" ({{lang}}). Use context: {{excerpt}}. Additional context: {{context}}. Visual theme: CPA backstage, media buying operations, creative testing rooms, tracker dashboards, dark neon city-console mood, layered perspective, no text, no logos.

Source routes, cost zones, performance overlays and signal pathways.
Rapid rebuild of landing assets, domains and routing in a crisis setup.

Cards, metrics, notes and source maps arranged like a tactical operations board.
A small affiliate team working in a dark control-room environment with urgency and focus.
A perspective corridor of signals, trackers and decision nodes moving into the distance.
